title: Pleione viscosa
taxonomy: Pleione viscosa is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the tribe Cranichideae and is a member of the genus Pleione. Pleione viscosa is a type of terrestrial orchid that is native to Asia and is often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The exact classification of Pleione viscosa may vary depending on the source, but it is generally classified as a type of flowering plant within the kingdom Plantae. Additionally, Pleione viscosa is sometimes classified as a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae.
uses: Pleione viscosa is a species of orchid, and although information about its medicinal uses is limited, traditional Chinese medicine has utilized Pleione viscosa for its potential health benefits. intro: Pleione viscosa, also known as the sticky orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayan region.
